item.title: Measured in centuries
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Nothing beats a long-term plan.

item.title: Racial casing
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Some things, like shame, is still reinforced by news agencies. Reminds me a lot about newspeak in 1984 . The media does this to divide people. pic.twitter.com/E2rqC2NZdZ — Agorist Nexus (Brandon) (@AgoristN) April 8, 2025

item.title: Laos 2026
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Explored Laos the last week, a country with vast caves, top-notch waterfalls and even jumped on an airy hot ait ballon ride. Don Det takes it away with the best vibe.

item.title: Dating standards
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Did you know women are remarkably good at settings standards for what kind of guy they would like to date? Men - not so good at this. Time to level up the game, boys. Signs to look after for finding yourself a quality woman:

item.title: Uneducated men
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: ~ Thomas Hodgskin

item.title: The cold, precise, perfect people
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: ~ Henry Ward Beecher

item.title: Hostility towards cash
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: The hostility towards cash in Norway is astounding. Just today I tried to pay twice with cash, but was forced to pay with plastic. To accept cash for most payments in Norway is mandatory , but there is no real enforcement. Most Norwegians pay with cards or Vipps without any second thought, creating data sets for banks and financial corporations that have huge privacy implications. But when I ask to pay with crypto or goldbacks at the coffee shop, people look at me like I’m an alien.

item.title: Bitcoin's purpose
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Bitcoin as digital gold is a blasphemic statement. Original post available here Bitcoin’s purpose is crystal clear. Satoshi Nakamoto’s whitepaper, “Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System,” explicitly outlines Bitcoin as digital cash. The whitepaper discusses creating a decentralized currency for everyday transactions, not a store of value like digital gold. Read the whitepaper and see for yourself. 1/ The title of the whitepaper itself - “Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System” - states the purpose directly: Bitcoin was meant to be used as cash.

item.title: Khmer coast 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: That’s why I’m here; for proper sun exposure. But getting genital sun exposure was difficult (as expected). Still happy with Nesat, Koh Rong, Koh Rong Samloem & Kampot. And you know you’re at the right place when they have a huge durian statue on public display. That fruit is… a gift from the Gods.

item.title: Risks of autonomy
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: ~ Antonio Escohotado

item.title: Siem Reap 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: I’m finding happier people - and no pride flags, here in Cambodia.

item.title: Ferske spor: October 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichmans musikkblogg in Norwegian 🇳🇴 here . Aloha! A new round of gripping fresh tracks with a juju-esque filter is falling like leaves, straight into your headphones. If you haven’t caught my recommendations here in 2025, you can pick up the thread via Spotify here . And now, for the late summer’s repeat-friendly tracks; Farhot - MARS (2025) A catchy homage to East African music with its intricate samples.

item.title: Parking allowed
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: I wanna park wherever I want.

item.title: A heart outside of your body
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Having a child is like having a heart that is outside of your body. Family units and the simple life are underrated in modern societies.

item.title: What every woman should know
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: To all women, with love.

item.title: Gaslightning
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: It must be in your head, riiite? "Gaslightning" ⛽️⚡️ When people tell you that the Bitcoin Lightning Network actually works great, and all of its numerous user experience issues are all in your head. — Joel Valenzuela (@TheDesertLynx) October 27, 2024

item.title: Ferske spor: August 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichman music blog in Norwegian 🇳🇴 here . Lyra Sage – «Human» (2024) Out of the blue, came this year’s summer hit 2025. A relatively unknown artist on Spotify has filled my droplets at all times this summer. A clear and groovy beat, with room for playfulness. Take your ear canals to new musical heights. Montee – «Duality» (2023) Now for a bit of darker stuff. This bass resonates wonderfully with a shadowy vibe.

item.title: Stone skipping is a lost art
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Meet an amazing man who has dedicated his entire adult life to stone skipping, sacrificing everything to produce world-record throws that defy the laws of physics. To hear him tell it, he has no choice.

item.title: The financial system has reached the end
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: It’s irrelevant which currency wins the race to the bottom. Check out the link below. The financial system has reached the end The world is now witnessing the end of a currency and financial system which the Chinese already forecast in 1971 after Nixon closed the gold window. Read More

item.title: 3 things I have learned today
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: You don’t need a thermometer. Just look at your coconut oil, it has all the answers. The face you make during a workout should tell you if what you are doing is healthy/beneficial - or not. I will never find the person that says they regret NOT taking the covid vaccine.

item.title: The proper response
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: ~ William Carlos Williams

item.title: The modern world is a massive scam
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: sunscreen destroys your skin casual sex destroys sexuality banks destroys wealth news destroys information schools destroy intelligence heart healthy oils destroy your heart veganism destroys the planet feminism destroys femininity the modern world is a massive scam — Carnivore Aurelius ©🥩 ☀️🦙 (@AlpacaAurelius) March 10, 2025

item.title: Mugshots of anti-vaxxers
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Images of those craaaazy anti-vaxxers, i.e. people like you and me.

item.title: Ferske spor: July 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichman music blog in Norwegian 🇳🇴 here . 40 Winks – Outside the box (It’s the trip, 2011) This summer’s revival (which really means spending a lot of time organizing playlists) gave me a nice reunion with 40 Winks, and it was hard not to include this drum firework of a song. It's The Trip by 40 Winks High contrast – Derestoration [Mixtape] (2011) Word on the street is that High Contrast’s latest production is, as they say in Norwegian; super-fly.

item.title: I am
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: I am Unity. I am God. I am Sovereign. I am Free.

item.title: Ferske spor: Juni 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichmans musikblogg in Norwegian 🇳🇴 here . Kiasmos - Sisteron (Sisteron, 2025) Minimal, atmosferisk elektronica. Har et eterisk og kontemplerende lydbilde som bidrar til at denne sangen blir både intim og storslått. Kiasmos klarer her å levere en sang som er smått hypnotisk, med med nok påfyll av organisk varme. Cercle · Kiasmos - Sisteron Nym - Ten thousand smokes (False noon, 2023) En reise gjennom et kaleidoskop av lyd.

item.title: Men are solar, Women are lunar
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Could be an idea to respect your natural cycles. Original post available here Men are solar, women are lunar. Men have a 24 hour testosterone testosterone cycle which peaks in the morning and declines through the day. Women have a 28 day hormonal cycle that changes with the 28 day cycle of the moon. Men are meant to work hard in the morning and around lunch time and relax later in the day.

item.title: The government's boot
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: ~ Gary Lloyd

item.title: Why finding love feels harder than ever
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Negative take: If you hate being single just try dating today. You’ll enjoy being single much more. Positive take: Would you rather be alone or with a woman who tests you constantly? She tests you to feel your power, not your weakness. Conclusion: Date a woman that represents what you would want your daughter to be like. Spotify:

item.title: When the Taurus moon kicks in
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Rich, strong and tropical flavors.. that’s the trademark. Quite simple, but still elegant.

item.title: The anxious/avoidant deathtrap
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: These threat-models are recognizable and relatable. You need to identify your patterns, and that might take some time.. Either way, the most important takeaway is, as always: Emotional resilience. Spotify:

item.title: The end of ideology
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: It is not about left or right dogma anymore. It is about whether you are a centralist or a decentralist, a gigantist or minimalist. The end of ideology means embracing open societies that offer "political" choice and experimentation sandboxes. — Sterlin Lujan (@SterlinLujan) May 9, 2025

item.title: Darknet Market Maximalism
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: The success of cryptocurrency depends on its ability to disrupt the traditional financial system and challenge the power of governments and central banks. Check out the link below. Darknet Market Maximalism A manifesto by xenu Read More You can also listen the manifest here: mp3 Odysee

item.title: Don't do what you don't want to do
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: You do not need a f*cking charger 📴

item.title: At the expense of morality
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: ~ Aaron Day

item.title: Bro science breathwork
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Breathing deeply and with ease is one of the most potent ways to make love to and connect with oneself on a moment to moment basis

item.title: At your funeral
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Original post available here At your funeral, friends and family will argue over who gets your belongings. People will talk about the food and the venue. Your life will be summarized in 2-3 paragraphs. Conversations will shift from your life to their lives. Your friends will drive away thinking about what’s next on their to-do list. Some people won’t be able to make it because “something came up." And most of the people you know today won’t even be there.

item.title: The dude in the red dress
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: “IT’S MA’AM !!!” {{ template “_internal/disqus.html” . }}

item.title: Fall in love
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Follow the correct order before attempting shortcuts. ~ Frida Kahlo

item.title: Important to wash your hands
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: In the toxic environments of today, there is one thing that is more important than washing your hands after using the toilet: Washing your hands before you use the toilet (i.e. grabbing your genitals).

item.title: Ferske spor: April 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichman music blog in Norwegian 🇳🇴 here . Nesrine – «Ya Lil» A voice that oozes suggestion in a rhythmic Franco-Algerian backdrop of cellos. Warmth and sensibility, yet dynamic enough to weave the threads seamlessly until you’re left with a rather comfortable garment that you’ll want to wear again – and again. 13th Ward Social Club, santadolora & Agent-X – «Chan Chan» Making a remix of such an iconic song is not a task to be taken lightly.

item.title: Choosing the sex of a child
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Never forget.

item.title: Enslaved by the UFC
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Goatis (sv3rige) has solid nutritional and health advice, although his style is not for the soft-hearted snowflakes. Either way, his British accent imitations are the funniest 😂

item.title: Reject statism
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: The world has long been governed by systems of statism—systems built on force, coercion, and the suppression of individual sovereignty. These systems present themselves as protectors of order and providers of security, yet at their core, they perpetuate violence, extortion, and control.

item.title: Stand out in all your weirdness
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Your job in life is to stand out in all your weirdness, not to fit in.

item.title: The money in your bank
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: The money you have in the bank.. Are not yours Is not money Are not held by the bank

item.title: But you work all day for money
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)

item.title: Ferske spor: March 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichmans music blog in Norwegian 🇳🇴 here . Flock – «Turned skyward» Atmospheric track from the album Flock II, a collaboration with several innovative musicians from London’s experimental music scene. A balanced but at the same time hypnotic journey. Art of Tones – «A comfort zone» Groovy and bouncy floating song by French producer Ludovic Llorca from the album Unbalanced (2018). Expect deeep house, jazz-funk and a little disco influence.

item.title: Don't be realistic
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Stay far away from anyone who tells you to ‘be realistic’.

item.title: Stop trying to be productive
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Why leisure is the basis for civilization

item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)

item.title: If you seek..
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Original post available here If you seek success, cultivate discipline, not pleasure. If you seek strength, embrace struggle, not comfort. If you seek wealth, value creation, not consumption. See also:

item.title: Xochipilli in temicxoch
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Xochipilli , the Aztec god of beauty, youth, love, passion, sex, sexuality, fertility, arts, song, music, dance, painting, writing, games, playfulness, nature, vegetation, and flowers, is here depicted in a state referred to as temicxoch, or “dream flowers,” which symbolizes an entheogenic experience. This state is associated with the ingestion of psychoactive plants and fungi, such as mushrooms, tobacco, and ololiuhqui seeds. Its head is tilted up, eyes open, jaw tensed, and mouth half open, a typical expression of ecstasy.

item.title: Sveti Jovan Kaneo
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Ohrid vibes 🇲🇰

item.title: The true size
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: In Norwegian this is called a ‘realitetsorientering’. Every map projection introduces distortion, and each has its own set of problems. One of the most common criticisms of the Mercator map is that it exaggerates the size of countries nearer the poles (US, Russia, Europe), while downplaying the size of those near the equator (the African Continent). Check out the link below. Compare countries with this simple tool Drag and drop countries around the map to compare their relative size

item.title: Sticky lovesongs for Deichman
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Sticky lovesongs for Deichman Musikkblogg (in Norwegian 🇳🇴): Moreno Veloso - Deusa de Amor Music Typewriter by Moreno Veloso The Gaylads - Joy in the morning Soul Beat by The Gaylads Barbara Mason - I do love you Spotify: YouTube: Smoke City - Underwater love Spotify: YouTube:

item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)

item.title: Beyond the state
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Important reflections on the nature of the state, and how to respond to its oppression. Check out the link below. Beyond the State: The Voluntaryist Vision of The Free City of Liberstad For centuries, countless individuals have sought to reform the state, believing they could shape it into something just, moral, or even voluntary. Read More

item.title: Theatre for the slave class
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: God morgen, god morgen – til hele bondegården 🚜🐄🐖🐔

item.title: Ferske spor / Januar 2025
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link til Deichmans musikblogg her . SpellSpellSpell – «I wanna» Ikke den enkleste sangen å finne online, men hvis du har savnet å høre fra Spice Girls så kan du jo spinne denne remixen for en lo-fi-versjon med mer chill enn 90-talls-popgnål. Bearcubs – «Yeah (Never know)» Hender ned for denne sangen som jeg har spilt mest siden vintersolverv. Utforskende atmosfærisk med en hint av uvisshet? Trykker på de riktige knappene?

item.title: The prosecution of Roger Ver
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: *They call him “Bitcoin Jesus,” though he despises the nickname. His real name is Roger Ver. At any moment, Roger could be arrested for alleged tax evasion and mail fraud. But anyone familiar with his case knows the truth: Roger’s only “crime” was being the very first investor and passionate advocate for Bitcoin. For that, he faces 109 years in federal prison. As devastating as this is for Roger, this case is less about him and more about you.

item.title: How to survive a plunge from a waterfall
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Credit: AoM

item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Sol ☀️ y Luna 🌙

item.description: The most powerful men are also the most un-reactive men.

item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: ~ Frank Zappa

item.title: Be like water
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: A short guide on how to navigate the waves of life 🌊

item.title: Deichman: Album of the year 2024
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Link to Deichmans music blog (in Norwegian 🇳🇴) is available here . Where do you want to go today? Maybe your brain needs a transcendental head massage, or are you in the nostalgic corner? Do you dare to listen to an album that compulsively and somatically moves you? If that doesn’t suit your taste, you can always give your soul a funky spa gift card? All this and your annual dose of micronutrients are here!

item.title: If you want..
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Original post available here If you want strength, train. If you want peace, meditate. If you want growth, challenge yourself. If you want fulfillment, pursue your passion. See also:

item.title: Bitcoin is an embarrassment
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: I’d also feel embarrassed to promote Bitcoin nowadays. What we’re seeing is just the NGUC (Number Go Up Crowd) pumping their bags, while real P2P freedom money like Monero and Zano actually deliver on the original promise. At what price will Bitcoin change the world? The endgame was supposed to be creating a new economy, not just trading back into fiat. This is what selling your crypto-anarchist soul looks like.

item.title: Pluto in Aquarius
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Big changes are ahead for humanity as Pluto has entered Aquarius for good over the next 20 years. An astrological guide to what we are all feeling right now. Check out the link below. Pluto In Aquarius, US Pluto Return, And The Times Ahead In this episode, Laura and Bernhard discuss the Pluto Return of the US in light of recent and current events and the outlook on the bigger picture and the times ahead.

item.title: Vastly preferable to those that follow authority
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: ~ Benjamin Tucker

item.title: Junk Culture
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Scientism is junk science News is junk information Public school is junk education Fiat is junk money Doctors are junk healers Bureaucracy is junk governance Cities are junk villages Supermarkets are junk farms Religions are junk spirituality Television is junk storytelling Virtual reality is junk experience Celebrities are junk role models Fluorescent lights are junk sunlight Modernist buildings are junk architecture Dating apps are junk connections Casual hookup is junk sex

item.title: How do you choose to suffer?
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Everybody wants what feels good.

item.title: The courage to be disliked
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Tittel: The courage to be disliked Forfatter: Ichiro Kishimi & Fumitake Koga Mer enn bare barndomstraumer: Det Freud ikke fortalte deg. I denne tankevekkende boka, i form av en levende sokratisk dialog mellom en filosof og en ung mann, får vi innblikk i hvordan våre tanker, følelser og handlinger påvirker våre relasjoner med andre og med oss selv. Den legger vekt på temaer som mot, traumer, ansvar, verdier – og hvordan vi kan bruke disse prinsippene til å leve et mer meningfylt liv.

item.title: Bankers are looting the world
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: ~ Frankie Boyle

item.title: Lessons from the Sioux in how to turn a boy into a man
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Check out the link below. Lessons from the Sioux in How to Turn a Boy Into a Man The Indian, in his simple philosophy, was careful to avoid a centralized population, wherein lies civilization’s devil. He would not be forced to accept materialism as the basic principle of his life, but preferred to reduce existence to its simplest terms. His roving out-of-door life was more precarious, no doubt, than life reduced to a system, a mechanical routine; yet in his view it was and is infinitely happier.

item.title: Lots of food for a long time
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Game meat provides a lot of food for a long time, and should be a top priority if you live in Norway. Grazing animals are a miracle. Greater calorie density also means we don’t have to eat all the time, as we do if we eat plant-based. The choice is ridiculously simple if you live in Norway: All animal and local food is better than importing avocados and bananas from faraway lands.

item.title: Are you a boobs or an ass guy?
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Rogan: “Alright, Mr. Trump, the people have been dying to know: Are you a boobs or an ass guy?” Trump: “Joe, that’s a tremendous question. Now, lots of people, they’re boobs people. And I respect that. Boobs are incredible. When I was president, we had the best boobs, folks.… pic.twitter.com/yRwRM5mbFY — Carnivore Aurelius ©🥩 ☀️🦙 (@AlpacaAurelius) October 27, 2024

item.title: About
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: Welcome to Casa de JuJu 👋🏼 Aloha! I’m an INFJ from Colombia 🇨🇴, currently rooted in Norway 🇳🇴. I like to explore the balance between modern life and our ancient connection to the earth. I look for complementary patterns in nature and in human relationships. Yin and yang, masculine and feminine, structure and flow. I am passionate about rewilding strategies , agorism , sociology, genital sun exposure, evolutionary astrology and decentralized privacy tools that support personal freedom.

item.title: Luna's cartoons
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Casa de JuJu)
item.description: My daughter has begun drawing cartoons. I promised to publish them online, so here goes (In Norwegian) Datteren min har startet å tegne tegneserier, og jeg lovte å legge de ut på internett, so her er de (på Norsk)
